title: Support services and tools - Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) tax incentives - Canada.ca
content:
Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) tax incentives

## Support services and tools
Whether you are new to the program or have experience claiming SR&ED tax incentives, the Canada Revenue Agency offers a variety of free tools and services to support you throughout the claim process.

## Learn about the program
Register for a webinar to gain a deeper understanding of the SR&ED program and its benefits

### SR&ED education and outreach
Find out how the outreach team can help your organization learn more about SR&ED tax incentives
Access infographics, videos, and other products that can help you better understand the program

## Find out if your work may be eligible

### Guidelines on the eligibility of work
Consult our guidelines to learn about what work is eligible as SR&ED

### Self-Assessment and Learning Tool
Find out if your work may be eligible, estimate the amount of investment tax credit you could receive, and understand the documentation you need to support your claim

### How to prepare your claim
Follow our step-by-step guide to identify and calculate qualifying expenses, and to help prepare your claim
Learn how to access the Client Portal within My Business Account: a secure self-service space designed to help you prepare your claim

### Contact an SR&ED specialist
Call us if you have questions about your SR&ED claim

## Still have questions? We’re here to help!
Call us if you have questions about the SR&ED program, including eligibility, calculating expenditures, submitting your claim, or tracking the status of a claim

### Join our mailing list
Sign up for our electronic mailing list to get the latest program updates, including upcoming webinars

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
